outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Iran warns countries enforcing sanctions will 'face problems' in Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: CNN reports IRGC's escalatory warning that missiles are 'locked' on American targets and countries enforcing sanctions will face problems transiting Hormuz. Analysis: Trump is trapped by his own strategy as he grapples for an exit.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Israeli drone strikes near Beirut kill 4 as southern airstrikes kill at least 13
outlets.summary: WaPo covers the heaviest Israeli strikes in Lebanon since ceasefire: 4 killed near Beirut, 13+ in southern villages including children. Raises questions about whether the peace process can survive escalation.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: The U.S. fires on Iranian tankers trying to evade its blockade
outlets.summary: NPR reports US warships fired on and disabled two Iranian tankers, the most serious Hormuz confrontation since ceasefire. UAE also reports new missile/drone attack from Iran — first since April.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Pakistan says it's hopeful a U.S.-Iran deal can happen soon
outlets.summary: Pakistani Foreign Ministry spokesperson Tahir Andrabi: 'We expect an agreement sooner rather than later' on US-Iran deal mediated by Pakistan. NPR notes Pakistan's pivotal role in 14-point MOU negotiations.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Iran says it will respond to US peace offer 'at the appropriate time' — rejects deadlines
outlets.summary: Fox reports Iran's refusal to meet Trump's timeline. Frames it as Tehran stalling while maintaining Hormuz blockade. Gas prices at $4.52. Markets rally on deal hopes despite Iran's non-response.

outlets.name: Fox Business
outlets.headline: Gas prices surge as Iran tensions escalate — AAA reports second straight 25-cent weekly increase
outlets.summary: Fox Business covers surging gas prices hitting $4.52/gal, highest since 2022. Frames as direct cost to American families from Iran's Hormuz blockade. Notes $1.40 higher than a year ago.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: IRGC warns US against attacks on ships; Israel bombs Lebanon
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera Day 72 liveblog: IRGC warns missiles locked on US targets. Israel kills 39 in Lebanon. Kuwait/UAE intercept Iranian drones. Bulk carrier hit off Qatar. Qatar PM warns Iran against using Hormuz as pressure card.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: What we know about Iran's response to the latest US ceasefire proposal
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera analyzes Iran's stance on the 14-point MOU. Iran FM says will respond 'at appropriate time.' Key sticking points: enrichment duration, Hormuz sequencing, sanctions timeline.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: At least 39 killed in fresh Israeli strikes on Lebanon as ceasefire collapses
outlets.summary: Euronews reports Israel's heaviest Lebanon strikes since April 17 ceasefire killed 39 Saturday. IDF claims 100+ Hezbollah militants killed over weekend. Ceasefire effectively non-existent on Lebanon front.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Israel Reportedly Set Up Secret Military Outpost in Iraq to Aid in Iran Strikes
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers WSJ revelation of Israel's secret base in Anbar province, Iraq. Special forces hub for Iran strikes. IDF killed Iraqi soldier who nearly found it. Major sovereignty implications.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Hezbollah says launched missiles at military base in north Israel
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog covers Hezbollah missile salvo at Nahariya base, drone swarm on another base. 3 IDF reservists wounded. Retaliation for Israel's 24+ killed in Lebanon May 9.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: IDF kills Hezbollah terrorists in southern Lebanon — claims 100+ militants over weekend
outlets.summary: JPost reports IDF claims 100+ Hezbollah militants killed over weekend, 40+ infrastructure sites struck. 3 reservists wounded by Hezbollah explosive drones.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: IRGC warns US against further attacks on Iranian vessels — missiles locked on targets
outlets.summary: Press TV covers IRGC's warning that missiles and drones are 'locked on American targets, awaiting command to fire.' Frames Iran's position as defensive. Emphasizes US as aggressor attacking Iranian tankers.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Khamenei adviser: Strait of Hormuz is 'capability equivalent to atomic bomb'
outlets.summary: Iran International covers adviser Mohammad Mokhber's statement comparing Iran's Hormuz control to nuclear capability. Says Iran 'neglected' its strategic position for too long and will change the legal regime of the strait.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran activates new Strait of Hormuz transit system as US blockade ends in failure
outlets.summary: Press TV frames PGSA launch as Iranian sovereignty triumph. Claims Project Freedom pause proves US failure. IRGC warns ships outside Iranian corridor face 'decisive action.'
